evidence: Spelling correction: 'Boxburghshire' is a B/R typo for 'Roxburghshire' — the historic county in southern Scotland. Confirmed via Wikidata Q664892 (label 'Roxburghshire' in en/nl/de/fr), Getty TGN 7002444, and broader_chain (Schotland -> Great Britain -> United Kingdom). The typo likely originated in Rijksmuseum's source data and survived multiple harvests because nothing downstream cross-checked label spelling against the authority record.
